text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro McQueen said she was feeling unwell
during training, so I've brought her to the
infirmary.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
It seems I was a little fatigued. I'm sorry to have
worried you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
But thanks to you, my mood has also rebounded.
Now, shall we resume training?
choice_data_list: Nuh-uh. No training until you've fully recovered.

Not a chance. I'll have to rethink your training
regimen.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
But thanks to you, my mood has also rebounded.
Now, shall we resume training?
choice_data_list: Nuh-uh. No training until you've fully recovered.

Not a chance. I'll have to rethink your training
regimen.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
You forbid it?! But I understand thoroughly how
to cope with my weakened condition.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: With a little rest, I'll surely—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Urgh... Well, you're being unusually strict today!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Fine, then. Unfortunate as it may be, I'll do as you
say and rest for the moment.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Stubborn ox...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I decide to have Mejiro McQueen focus on resting
for the remainder of the day.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
What?! But you went through so much trouble to
put it together!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I can judge for myself whether I've reached my
limits or not. This small setback is no proble—
choice_data_list: By the time you collapse, it'll be too late.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Ugh!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I've inconvenienced you with my poor
self-management... I'm truly sorry.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro McQueen's injury is taking a long time to
heal. Maybe her mental state has had an impact
on her recovery.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Ngh... I understand.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
This is all the result of my own inadequacies. This
time, I will graciously accept my lot.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
However, I wish for my next training regimen to
be stricter than this one!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I will get better as soon as possible, and next
time, I will complete your tests without fail!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro McQueen gets better in no time, just as
she declared she would. Starting the following
day, she's in superb form.
